logs.message: Package 'AutoMapper' 12.0.1 has a known high severity vulnerability, https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rvv3-g6hj-g44x

Package 'BCrypt 1.0.0' was restored using '.NETFramework,Version=v4.6.1, .NETFramework,Version=v4.6.2, .NETFramework,Version=v4.7, .NETFramework,Version=v4.7.1, .NETFramework,Version=v4.7.2, .NETFramework,Version=v4.8, .NETFramework,Version=v4.8.1' instead of the project target framework 'net10.0'. This package may not be fully compatible with your project.
